# Meta-Ensemble Key Report Plots  Scope: VN validation only. Holdout/test is not used. Model: `hgb_abs_blend` meta-ensemble over frozen 5-seed hetero anchor.  Overall validation rel_score: `0.048809`. Blend alpha: `0.475`.  ## Daily Error Summary  | series           |   median |      p90 |      max |   days_gt_3pct |   days_gt_3p5pct | |:-----------------|---------:|---------:|---------:|---------------:|-----------------:| | median_abs_error | 0.011646 | 0.024806 | 0.080161 |             47 |               30 | | q75_abs_error    | 0.021976 | 0.044818 | 0.095388 |            160 |              119 | | q90_abs_error    | 0.036383 | 0.062609 | 0.115699 |            469 |              360 |  #

# Meta-Ensemble Median Error Control  Scope: VN validation only. Holdout/test is not used.  This report is intentionally based on daily median absolute error, not daily Q90 tail error. The goal is to show the central-error stability of the frozen `hgb_abs_blend` meta-ensemble.  ## Summary  | series                     |   days |   median |      p90 |      max |   days_gt_3pct |   share_gt_3pct | |:---------------------------|-------:|---------:|---------:|---------:|---------------:|----------------:| | median_abs_error           |    659 | 0.011646 | 0.024806 | 0.080161 |             47 |        0.07132  | | mean_abs_error             |    659 | 0.016392 | 0.029816 | 0.081857 |
